text:
, born on 12 March 1968, is a Japanese animator, illustrator, designer, and animation director.
Honda has joined the GAINAX studio after dropping out of Tokyo Design Academy. Honda adapted the original mecha designs to fit animation in Neon Genesis Evangelion and also the Rebuild of Evangelion, where he also adapted character designs, taking over Yoshiyuki Sadamoto in the last two films of the series. He is also a prolific illustrator, making illustrations to magazines, calendars, merchandising and collaborations.

Works

TV Anime/OVA

Nadia: The Secret of Blue Water: Animation director, key animation, ending animation (ep 39)
Fatal Fury 2: The New Battle: Key animation
Metal Fighter Miku: Character design, ending animation, assistant animation director (ep.13), key animation (ep.13)
Pretty Soldier Sailor Moon S: Key animation (ep.14)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: (Opening animation, animation director (for episodes 2, 8, 19, 22, 25), key animation (for episodes 1, 19, 25-26), supplementary set (episode 15)
Hell Teacher Nūbē: Animator, animation supervision
Fighting Spirit: Key animation (opening)
RahXephon: Key animation (ep.15)
Rozen Maiden: Key animation (opening)
Paranoia Agent: Key animation (ep.8, 13)
Windy Tales: Key animation (opening, ep.2)
BECK: Mongolian Chop Squad: Key animation (opening, ep.7)
Gankutsuou: The Count of Monte Cristo: Key animation (opening)
He Is My Master: Ending support
Dennō Coil: Character design, chief animator

Roujin Z: Key animation
Ghost in the Shell: Prop design
Memories: Magnetic Rose: Prop design
The End of Evangelion: Eva series designer, mechanical animation director (episode 25'), key animation 25'
Perfect Blue: Key animation
Jin-Roh: Key animation
Millennium Actress: Character design, animation director, key animation
Beyond: Character design, animation director
The Second Renaissance: Key animation
Ghost in the Shell 2: Innocence: Key animation
Naruto the Movie: Snow Princess' Book of Ninja Arts: Key animation, animation director, scene director
Portable Kūkō: Key animation
Soratobu Toshi Keikaku: Key animation
Tennis no Ōjisama - Futari no Samurai: Key animation
Tales from Earthsea: Key animation
Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone: Key animation, mechanical animation director

From up on Poppy Hill: Key animation
A Letter to Momo: Key animation

Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time: Original Character Design

Trivia

At GAINAX, Honda debuted in drawing supervision at age 22.
His debut as character designer was on the series Metal Fighter Miku.
Honda has done some prop designs.
